violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside and out of coolers. -Clean racks in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors edges and floors under equipment need more thorough cleaning.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Chicken cold hold was at 53F. Was turned off.
